one_time_description: Nihtat Gwich'in Council contribution of $250,000 (new in 2020, not present in 2019)
economic_notes: Council owns 1,035 of 4,004,150 limited partnership units in Gwich'in Investments Limited Partnership (GILP), which holds 13.34% in Denendeh Investments Limited Partnership and 51% interest in Mackenzie Valley Construction Ltd. Council is economically dependent on Indigenous Services Canada and Government of NWT for major revenue.
notes: Fiscal year end March 31, 2020. Auditor signed January 27, 2021. One consolidated subsidiary via modified equity method: Gwich'in Investment Limited Partnership (GILP). No budget figures were provided in the statements (all budget columns show dashes). Nihtat Gwich'in Council $250,000 COVID-19 support contribution is a significant non-recurring item. Accounts payable note shows $164,119 vs balance sheet $164,117 (rounding difference of $2). COVID-19 subsequent event disclosed. Council is not subject to federal, territorial or local government taxes.
